name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement standard terms for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, containing fillable fields for parties, purpose, term, and governing law.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement standard terms covering access, use, payment, security, liability, and confidentiality for cloud-based software services.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement standard terms defining uptime targets, response time commitments, service credits, and remedies.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper Design Partner Agreement standard terms for early product access programs where partners provide feedback in exchange for early use.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper Professional Services Agreement standard terms governing consulting, implementation, and other professional services engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement standard terms for GDPR-compliant data processing, covering processor obligations, transfers, security incidents, and audits.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper Partnership Agreement standard terms for business partnerships including cooperation, trademark licensing, payment, and confidentiality.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper Software License Agreement standard terms for on-premise or installable software licensing, covering usage rights, restrictions, and maintenance.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper Pilot Agreement standard terms for trial or evaluation periods of a product before entering a longer-term agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper Business Associate Agreement standard terms for HIPAA-compliant handling of protected health information between covered entities and business associates.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper AI Addendum standard terms supplementing a primary agreement to address AI-specific concerns including model training, input/output ownership, and AI disclaimers.
